game_info.title: A Few Quick Matches
game_info.concept:
A FEW QUICK MATCHES is a fast-paced, 1-4 player platform fighter that lets you bring old-school stick battles to life! play with your friends locally, or challenge players online in this flash-inspired spectacle! Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3805420/A_Few_Quick_Matches/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ A FEW QUICK MATCHES is a fast-paced, 1-4 player platform fighter that lets you bring old-school stick battles to life! play with your friends locally, or challenge players online in this flash-inspired spectacle!

A fast-paced, easy to play, tiny platform fighter for 1-4 players, built to honor the era where stick fights ruled the internet! 

STYLE ON EVERYONE! We wanted A FEW QUICK MATCHES to feel like an old-school stick fight, which means flashy animations and impactful moments! To attain this feel, we made it so that most successful hits can be cancelled into air dashes, meaning your follow-up routes are nearly infinite. Deep-diving into this combo system is incredibly rewarding, and landing a well-executed chain of attacks feels uniquely satisfying. While this mechanic is not necessary to enjoy your battles, those who choose to embrace it will push the game to its limits!






FIGHT ANYONE! We designed our game with online play in mind. A FEW QUICK MATCHES harnesses the amazing magic of ROLLBACK NETCODE to ensure smooth, lag-free battles across the internet. Host lobbies to challenge your friends, or hop into quickplay to match up with any player in your region.
game_info.description: A fast-paced stick figure platform fighter! Engage in high-speed combat, execute stylish combos, and master the art of the dash-cancel. Defeat your opponent by depleting their health bar or knocking them off the stage.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move character / Aim dash
- Space: Jump (Double jump available)
- Z: Attack (Ground combo / Air attack)
- Shift: Dash (Can be used in air or to cancel hits)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (at Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Physics and Input Stability Test. This test verifies that the player character (controlled by automation) can move, jump, and interact with the physics engine without clipping or crashing.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will generate random movement inputs (Left, Right, Jump) and occasional attacks. It monitors the character's position to ensure it stays within valid bounds and gravity applies correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The character moves around the screen, gravity pulls them down, they collide with platforms correctly, and the game runs for 10 seconds without errors or getting stuck.

TEST_2.test_description: Combat Logic and Win Condition Test. This test verifies that the combat system works: attacks deal damage, health depletes, and the game correctly transitions to the WIN state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The automated controller will aggressively track the enemy AI, moving towards its X position and spamming the Attack key. It will attempt to stunlock the enemy to drain health quickly.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The automated player consistently lands hits, reduces the enemy HP to 0, triggers the death state, and the Game Phase transitions to "GAME_OVER_WIN" within 30 seconds.
